meta.title: TiDB Community Program - Connect & Build
meta.description: Join the TiDB Community Program to connect with developers, access exclusive resources, and participate in upcoming events.

props.headline: Join the TiDB Community
props.subheadline: Connect with developers worldwide, access exclusive resources, and build innovative solutions with TiDB.

props.title: Community Benefits
props.subtitle: Access tools, knowledge, and connections to accelerate your TiDB journey

items.title: Connect with Developers
items.description: Network with thousands of developers building with TiDB. Share experiences, ask questions, and collaborate on projects.

items.title: Access Exclusive Resources
items.description: Get documentation, tutorials, code samples, and best practices curated by TiDB experts and community members.

items.title: Learn at Events
items.description: Participate in webinars, meetups, workshops, and conferences. Connect with experts and expand your skills.

props.title: What's Included
props.subtitle: Everything you need to succeed with TiDB

items.title: Documentation
items.description: Comprehensive guides covering installation, deployment, tuning, and best practices.

items.title: Code Samples
items.description: Ready-to-use examples for common use cases and integrations with popular frameworks.

items.title: Community Forum
items.description: Ask questions, share solutions, and get support from community members and TiDB engineers.

items.title: Best Practices
items.description: Learn proven strategies for schema design, indexing, performance optimization, and troubleshooting.

items.title: Performance Tools
items.description: Access monitoring, profiling, and diagnostic tools to optimize your TiDB deployments.

items.title: Certifications
items.description: Validate your expertise with TiDB certifications. Become a recognized TiDB specialist.

props.title: Upcoming Community Events
props.subtitle: Join us to learn, network, and stay updated on TiDB innovations

items.title: TiDB Community Webinar Series
items.description: Deep dives into TiDB features, real-world use cases, and technical deep dives with TiDB engineers.

items.title: Community Meetups
items.description: Local and virtual meetups where developers share projects, demo applications, and exchange ideas.

items.title: TiDB Summit
items.description: Major conference featuring keynotes, workshops, and networking opportunities with the global TiDB community.

items.title: Office Hours
items.description: Get live support from TiDB engineers. Ask questions, troubleshoot issues, and optimize your deployments.

props.title: Growing Global Community
props.subtitle: Thousands of developers trust TiDB for their mission-critical applications

items.label: Active Community Members
items.description: Developers building with TiDB worldwide

items.label: Countries
items.description: Global presence and collaboration

items.label: Forum Discussions
items.description: Questions answered and solutions shared

items.label: Contributing Developers
items.description: Open source contributors to TiDB

props.title: Start Your Community Journey
props.subtitle: Choose the best way to engage with the TiDB community

items.title: Developers
items.description: Build applications with TiDB. Access code samples, documentation, and technical support.

items.title: Contributors
items.description: Contribute to TiDB open source. Help improve the database and shape its future.

items.title: Organizations
items.description: Partner with TiDB for technical integration, co-marketing, and enterprise support.

props.title: Ready to Join the TiDB Community?
props.subtitle: Start building innovative applications with TiDB today. Get free tier access and join thousands of developers.
